'''Corlass''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], both [[Ocean/Legends|seafaring]] and [[Realspace/Legends|spacefaring]]. Located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was one of the original member-worlds of the [[Kingdom of Cron]]. It was absorbed into [[Xim's empire]], and [[Xim/Legends|the Despot]] used many former Corlassi pirates as the [[Captain/Legends|captains]] of his warships.<ref name="Xim Week" />

After Xim's empire collapsed, Corlass would continue to be a source of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]], only sullenly and occasionally accepting lawfulness. It eventually joined the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
